response.global_analysis: 1. Song Identification: Identified YOASOBI's 'Gunjo' for the first segment and 'IRIS OUT' composed by Yurii Kuriyama for the second segment. Also identified the final talk segment by FLOWGLOW member Mizumi Yasu. 2. Manual Disambiguation: Carefully transcribed the rapid and stylized lyrics of Yurii Kuriyama's song, correcting references like 'yokoshima na osero wa kuro shika nai' (wicked Othello can only be black) and Harry Potter's Avada Kedavra reference with 'kumo mo moushiwake nai na' (sorry, spider too). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitled the visual title card for 'IRIS OUT' before the vocals kicked in, and timed the continuous rapid lyrics with zero cascading delay.

subtitles.original: 何回でも ほら何回でも
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, see, no matter how many times,

subtitles.original: 積み上げてきたことが武器になる
subtitles.english: everything I've built up will become my weapon.

subtitles.original: 周りを見たって 誰と比べたって
subtitles.english: Even if I look around, even if I compare myself to others,

subtitles.original: 僕にしかできないことはなんだ
subtitles.english: what is it that only I can do?

subtitles.original: 今でも自信なんか無い それでも
subtitles.english: Even now, I still have no confidence. Even so...

subtitles.original: 感じたことのない気持ち
subtitles.english: A feeling I've never felt before,

subtitles.original: 初めて感じたこの痛みも全部
subtitles.english: Even all of this pain that I felt for the first time,

subtitles.original: 好きなものと向き合うことで
